query: SELECT id, code, title, description, colorTheme, displayOrder FROM courses WHERE code LIKE 'GED-%' ORDER BY displayOrder;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2KiCrCqNDFcXt7P.577d1a63eeb5 --database P2Dpw9MQsmxzdUQCfGjV6b --execute SELECT id, code, title, description, colorTheme, displayOrder FROM courses WHERE code LIKE 'GED-%' ORDER BY displayOrder;

rows.title: Mathematical Reasoning
rows.description: Master mathematical concepts and problem-solving skills required for the GED Mathematical Reasoning exam. This course covers algebra, geometry, statistics, and data analysis.

rows.title: Reasoning Through Language Arts
rows.description: Develop reading comprehension, writing, and grammar skills for the GED Language Arts exam. Learn to analyze texts, write persuasive essays, and master grammar rules.

rows.title: Science
rows.description: Explore life science, physical science, and earth science concepts tested on the GED Science exam. Understand scientific processes, data interpretation, and real-world applications.

rows.title: Social Studies
rows.description: Study U.S. history, civics, economics, and geography for the GED Social Studies exam. Analyze historical documents, understand government systems, and interpret maps and charts.
